arts.sum: Inter’s defeat in the 2023 Champions League final against Manchester City is still lingering in...

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Arne Slot looking to make Reds more "Man City-esque" after "basketball" approach of Jurgen Klopp
arts.sum: Liverpool expert David Lynch tells Sports Mole that Arne Slot wants his side to be more "Man City-esque" in their control of games compared to Jurgen Klopp's approach.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Man Utd in contact with Man City’s dream Guardiola heir to replace Ten Hag
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, the Red Devils have already made contact with Sporting CP boss Ruben Amorim, who has been hailed as a natural heir to Guardiola at City. Manchester United are already in contact with numerous potential replacements for manager Erik ten Hag – but now the Red Devils are seeking to steal a sensational march on rivals Manchester City in the race for a coach lined up as Pep Guardiola’s successor.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola says he would advise on Man City successor when he eventually leaves the club
arts.sum: The Catalan insists he is yet to make a decision on whether or not he will extend his stay into a 10th season at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Barcelona tracking 16-year-old South American sensation likened to Erling Haaland
arts.sum: Barcelona are one of many clubs that regularly keeps an eye on the South American market in their search for talented youngsters, and the ongoing South American U15 Championship has allowed them to cast their eye over many options at the same time. For this, one has emerged above the rest: Juan Riquelme Angulo. arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola admires consistency of tennis 'geniuses' Rafa Nadal, Roger Federer and Novak Djokovic
arts.sum: Guardiola says he felt "a little bit sad" when Spanish compatriot Nadal announced his retirement, but the Premier League boss has paid tribute to the three legends who have dominated men's singles tennis for two decades, collectively winning 66 Grand Slam titles. Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says he is full of admiration for Rafael Nadal, Roger Federer and Novak Djokovic, calling them the "three geniuses" of tennis.

arts.ttl: 'He's answered' - Man City given clear Jack Grealish benefit
arts.sum: Manchester City ace Grealish, 29, netted the opener in England’s 3-1 Nations League win against Finland last weekend after being left out of Gareth Southgate’s Euro 2024 squad in the summer

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils ahead of Newcastle United in race for former Manchester City star
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly ready to leapfrog Newcastle United and sign Bayern Munich forward LEroy Sane should an opportunity present itself.

arts.ttl: I heard Pep Guardiola answer question nobody asked about Man City future
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about his future at the club as his contracts at the Etihad runs down
